sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value Nullable(String), num Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, '100-200', 1), (2, NULL, 2), (3, '300-400', NULL), (4, '', NULL);
SELECT regexpExtract(value, '(\\d+)-(\\d+)', 1) as extracted_value, id IS NULL FROM test_data HAVING extracted_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, regexpExtract(value, '(\\d+)-(\\d+)', 0) AS whole_match FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, regexpExtract(value, '(\\d+)-(\\d+)', 2) AS second_group, (num IS NULL) AS is_num_null FROM test_data WHERE regexpExtract(value, '(\\d+)-(\\d+)', 0) LIKE '%400%' ORDER BY is_num_null;
SELECT AVG(num) AS average_num FROM test_data WHERE (regexpExtract(value, '(\\d+)-(\\d+)', 1) IS NULL OR num IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY is_num_null = (num IS NULL);
SELECT id, value, (SELECT COUNT() FROM test_data t2 WHERE t2.value IS NULL) AS null_count FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND regexpExtract(value, '(\\d+)-(\\d+)', 0) = '';
SELECT DISTINCT regexpExtract(value, '(\\d+)-(\\d+)', 1) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data) sub WHERE sub.value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, regexpExtract(value, '(\\d+)-(\\d+)', 0) AS extracted_value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, extracted_value, NULL AS null_col FROM temp_data WHERE null_col IS NULL AND extracted_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC;
